'''Alastar Treen''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] who represented [[Corulag/Legends|Corulag]] in the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]] during the waning [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]]. In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], before the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|battle]] of [[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]], an assassination attempt was made on his life by the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]]. The attempt failed when he was rescued by [[Sia-Lan Wezz]], [[Rorworr (Naboo)|Rorworr]], [[Arani Korden]], and a group of adventurers. He was replaced by [[Zafiel Snopps]] after he was killed later by the Separatists during the start of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].
